entry.title: Visual Studio Code and GitHub Copilot - What's new in 1.114

media:group.media:title: Visual Studio Code and GitHub Copilot - What's new in 1.114
media:group.media:description:
In VS Code 1.114 new features like copy the final response from a chat were introduced. This video explains the new features by demoing them. Keep in mind that some features might not be available to you due to enterprise policies or a different pricing plan.
More info on https://tech.xebia.ms/github-copilot
00:00 Intro 00:12 Preview videos in the image carousel 00:46 Copy final response in chat 01:58 Troubleshoot previous chat sessions
Source: https://code.visualstudio.com/updates/v1_114
